mentions.note: Home builder with 20%+ cash buyers (mortgage-rate insensitive); Doug Yearley doing terrific job; CEO Cramer respects; best home builder play if buying residential real estate.
High-end home builder; decent time recently but rates rising hurt; stock less beaten down than peers but housing fundamentals remain challenging.
Caller Sandy reports Toll performing fine; Cramer suggests holding as home builder fundamentals remain strong in current rate environment.
Down 3.4%; home builder in group downgrade; high-end segment showing pressure from rates and consumer pullback.
Housing stock rally leader as supply arrives and prices normalize; led group higher alongside Lennar and homebuilders.
